title: Update Admin Credentials to ADMIN / Mahendra7959

requirements.text: Update the admin credentials stored in the Motoko backend so that the admin username/phone is set to 'ADMIN' and the password is set to 'Mahendra7959'. This must be applied via the stable actor variable or one-time initialization mechanism already in place — not hardcoded in frontend source code. The admin login flow on the frontend (Login page) must continue to authenticate against the backend actor using these new credentials.

quotes: admin ka phone number may ADMIN kr do or possword may Mahendra7959 kro

acceptanceCriteria: The Motoko backend actor stores admin phone/username as 'ADMIN' and password as 'Mahendra7959' (hashed or via stable variable).
Logging in at /admin with phone 'ADMIN' and password 'Mahendra7959' successfully authenticates and grants admin access.
Logging in with the old credentials (e.g., 'admin' / 'admin123') no longer works.
No admin credentials are hardcoded or exposed in any frontend source file.
Invalid credentials still show a proper error message on the login page.

constraints: Admin credentials must be stored and validated in the Motoko backend, not in frontend code.
Do not change any immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Adding new admin panel features or tabs.
Changing the admin panel UI layout.
Modifying user registration or login flows.
